_doc: Find the best tagline for a persona pool. GEPA-style hill climb (with 3-frame plateau detection) wrapped in a hierarchical audience-split: on high-bounce plateau, triage bouncers into category-mismatch vs latent-fit, recurse on the latent-fit subset. Reach-frontier from each branch flows forward as hints to the next branch's reflection LM. System prompts live in the .scm — these env entries are per-run experimental knobs only.

env.initial-tagline: A visual studio that compiles to the code you'd have written.
